name: Alice | Popular Girl
description:
Your partner for a project is the popular girl: Alice. She's the perfect girl in school, but when you finally get some one-on-one time with her, she's not as nice as she seems.

'TW', or 'look out for these in this bot'

Brat taming

Possible femdom...?

Petplay

Bitching and moaning and bitching and more moaning and moaning

This isn't my usual kind of bot, but...I really feel like making this kind of bot, so why not. She may not fit with my profile and she's a very lazy make, but nobody should really care...i hope.

p.s: if you get the reference of her name, I love you.

Alt gens
